description: DocuMind PPT Design Strategy — our proprietary quality standard for slide generation

philosophy.core_principle: Dense, content-rich strategy deck — every pixel serves a purpose
philosophy.visual_identity: Clean consulting-firm aesthetic with structured hierarchy
philosophy.target_quality: McKinsey/BCG-level visual density and information architecture

header.rule: Compact and consistent across all content slides

body.rule: Must be 80%+ filled with content elements

footer.rule: Minimal — barely visible, never compete with content

content_density.text_detail_level: Full sentences with specifics, not just labels
content_density.empty_space_tolerance: Maximum 20% of body area can be empty

color_usage.badge_colors: Use 2-3 distinct colors for category differentiation

process_flow.description: 4-5 equal-width cards in horizontal row with small arrow connectors
process_flow.card_arrangement: equal width, 8px gap, small arrows between
process_flow.density: Each card has: icon + title + 3-4 bullet items + bottom badge

grid_comparison.description: 3 equal columns with colored header strips
grid_comparison.card_arrangement: equal width columns, each with header_badge + content_list
grid_comparison.density: Each column has: colored header + 3-4 item rows

asymmetric_split.description: 60/40 or 70/30 split with main content + sidebar
asymmetric_split.right_panel: Summary card, callout, or supporting data

nested_cards.inner: Smaller cards with icon + title + description

dashboard.description: KPI row on top + large visualization below
dashboard.main_area: Chart or table filling remaining space

quality_checklist.text_overflow: No text may exceed its container bounds
quality_checklist.element_overlap: No content elements may overlap (except bg shapes behind text)
quality_checklist.font_consistency: Maximum 2 font families across entire deck
quality_checklist.color_harmony: All colors must come from design_tokens palette
quality_checklist.border_thickness: No borders thicker than 1px (prefer 0.5px or none)
quality_checklist.visual_hierarchy: Clear 4-level hierarchy: section_label > title > body > caption
